summary: Iteration 46: All 6 PageSpeed fixes verified. 1) PageSkel/LightSkel skeleton components with minHeight 100vh, 2) SettingsProvider CSS vars only update if != 80px default, 3) Images have width/height/aspectRatio attributes, 4) CookieConsentBanner position:fixed bottom:0, 5) Fonts use display=swap in Google Fonts URL, 6) No framer-motion on first screen. All routes working, admin login successful, no JS errors.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html: Google Fonts URL includes display=swap parameter
MainLanding.jsx: ProductCard has aspectRatio: '4/5' style, images have width=800 height=1000
MainLanding.jsx: Sauna card image has fetchpriority='high' for LCP optimization
Hero.jsx: Background image has width=1200 height=800 fetchpriority='high'
CookieConsentBanner.jsx: Uses className='fixed bottom-0' - verified position:fixed bottom:0px z-index:9998
SaunaHomePage.jsx: CSS vars only update if values differ from 80px default (lines 50-51)
App.js: PageSkel has minHeight:100vh bg:#0C0C0C, LightSkel has minHeight:100vh bg:#F9F9F7
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 PageSpeed fixes verified: skeleton components, CSS vars conditional update, image dimensions, cookie banner position, font-display:swap, no framer-motion. All routes working: /, /sauny, /balie, /blog, /b2b, /admin. Admin login works with admin/220066.

main_landing_mobile.details: Mobile view (390x844): header, 2 Cloudinary product cards with aspect-ratio:4/5, navigation buttons (Sauny, Balie, Blog, B2B)

product_card_images.details: Sauna card: width=800 height=1000 fetchpriority=high. Balie card: width=800 height=1000. Both have aspect-ratio:4/5 style

sauny_page_hero.details: /sauny Hero: Cloudinary bg image with width=1200 height=800 fetchpriority=high, no framer-motion

sauny_lazy_sections.details: Models, Calculator, Contact sections lazy-load on scroll

below_fold_sections.details: About section, Contact section, Map iframe load on scroll in MainLanding

cookie_banner.details: position:fixed, bottom:0px, z-index:9998, appears after ~3.5s delay, doesn't push content

admin_login.details: Admin login works with admin/220066 - dashboard loads with sidebar navigation

product_card_navigation.details: Sauna card navigates to /sauny, Balie card navigates to /balie

no_js_errors.details: No JavaScript errors on any page (excluding known DataCloneError from external emergent-main.js)

fonts_display_swap.details: Google Fonts URL includes display=swap, App.css has @font-face { font-display: swap }
